title: Top energy and regulatory advisor joins McCarthy Tétrault’s Business Law Group
content:
## Top energy and regulatory advisor joins McCarthy Tétrault’s Business Law Group
We’re excited to welcome Ljuba Djurdjevic as Counsel in our Business Law Group, based in Toronto. Ljuba’s practice focuses on energy, regulatory and public sector law, with a particular emphasis on helping clients navigate complex regulatory frameworks and advance their strategic energy initiatives.
A versatile, hands-on advisor, Ljuba brings more than 25 years of direct energy and regulated industry experience, having most recently served as senior counsel at the Ontario Energy Board and previously as in-house litigation counsel at some of Canada’s largest electricity transmission and distribution companies.
Ljuba has advised extensively on Ontario electricity market issues, including the IESO Market Renewal Program and IESO Market Rules. She has acted as Ontario Energy Board counsel on major cases involving challenges by market participants, and appeared in proceedings related to rate cases, construction and infrastructure, and market design. “Ljuba’s arrival further bolsters our pre-eminent energy group and provides additional bench strength in our ability to serve clients in this increasingly complex sector,” said Eva Bellissimo , Practice Group Leader, Business Law. “Her deep regulatory knowledge and strategic approach to project development, licensing and compliance matters make her a tremendous addition to our group.” “I’m excited to be continuing my practice with McCarthy Tétrault,” Ljuba said. “The firm’s collaborative style and national reach will allow me to support clients that are expanding and innovating Canada’s dynamic energy sector.”
Learn more about Ljuba’s practice and how she can help you.
Widely considered a market leader in providing legal support to the energy industry, our team helps clients make their most ambitious objectives a reality. From supporting the development, construction and financing of exciting and transformational projects to helping clients manage their projects’ social and environmental impacts, we have the expertise and foresight to mitigate risks and add value. We support developers, equity investors, lenders, major industrial and commercial users, operators, governments and government agencies with comprehensive insights into policies, key players, and stakeholders to successfully move energy projects through their life cycles. Learn more about our energy team .

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The firm has a substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
- Ljuba  Djurdjevic Counsel People.Offices.Singular Toronto
